rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving undefined identifiers or removing invalid clauses
Move implementation-level bindings from component type annexes to implementation annexes when needed
generic_rules: Validate that all AGREE expressions have well-defined types before use
Ensure component type contracts only reference visible features at that scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree blocks
Implementation-level assignments should be in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to fix type errors; instead resolve references or remove invalid clauses
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope boundaries for assumptions
